name: Korean Transit Pack
author: kimth9
description:
Korean Transit Pack

If you are looking for the perfect public transit options to accompany the "Korean Map Pack," this is the must-have download for you!

1. Included Transit Systems

  • GTX (Great Train eXpress) based on GTX-A | In-game Code : [KR] GTX
  • Korean-style Heavy Metro based on Seoul Line 1 | In-game Code : [KR] Heavy Metro
  • Korean-style Light Rail Transit based on Incheon Line 2 | In-game Code : [KR] Light Rail Transit
  • Korean-style Tram based on Wirye Line | In-game Code : [KR] Tram
  • Korean-style BRT based on Sejong BRT | In-game Code : [KR] BRT

All vehicle specifications, construction costs, and operating expenses have been meticulously balanced based on authoritative and official data.

2. Vehicle Info

Car length 20m/car 19.5m/car 16.35m/car 7m/module 9.1m/module

3. Data Sources

The data used in this pack is derived from the following sources:

  • GTX Data
    • GTX-A Preliminary Feasibility Study Report (Korea Development Institute [KDI], 2024)
    • Western Metropolitan Area Wide-Area Express Railway (GTX-D) Preliminary Feasibility Study Report (KDI, 2025)
  • Heavy Metro Data
    • Statistical Yearbook of Korean Railroads (Ministry of Land, Infrastructure and Transport, 2024)
    • Shinbundang Line Northwest Extension (Yongsan~Samsong) Preliminary Feasibility Study Report (KDI, 2023)
  • Light Rail Transit Data
    • Incheon Metro Line 2 Rolling Stock Data
    • Mokdong Line (Sinwol-dong~Dangsan) Preliminary Feasibility Study Report (KDI, 2025)
  • Tram Data
    • Seoul Wirye Line Tram (Upcoming) Rolling Stock Data
    • Ulsan Subway Line 1 Re-feasibility Study Report (KDI, 2023)
  • BRT Data
    • Hyundai Electric Articulated Bus Rolling Stock Data
    • Cheongna~Hwagok BRT Preliminary Feasibility Study Report (KDI, 2006)
  • Consumer Price Index (CPI) from the Bank of Korea Economic Statistics System (ECOS)

4. Future Update Roadmap

This map pack was developed using data from the following institutions:

  • This pack will be updated periodically to include the latest data and ensure compatibility with future game updates.
  • Monorail and Maglev may be include if good data will be searched

5. Feedback & Contact

If you have any suggestions, bug reports, or ideas for the maps, please feel free to share them with me on discord channel! Thank you for playing!
